hero.alt: Spotted hyena standing alert in dry grassland in Namibia
hero.caption: Spotted hyenas have sandy fur covered in dark spots and strong, sloping shoulders.

habitat.fileTitle: File:Hiena manchada (Crocuta crocuta), parque nacional de Tarangire, Tanzania, 2024-05-25, DD 25.jpg
habitat.alt: Spotted hyena walking through open savanna grass in Tanzania
habitat.caption: Spotted hyenas live across African savannas, woodlands, and dry country south of the Sahara.

diet.alt: Spotted hyena standing over its prey in green grassland
diet.caption: Hyenas are carnivores that both hunt their own prey and scavenge kills from other animals.

baby.alt: Dark-furred spotted hyena cub resting near its den
baby.caption: Hyena cubs are born with black fur and grow up in safe underground dens.

family.fileTitle: File:Spotted Hyaenas (Crocuta crocuta) female with cub ... (50332449498).jpg
family.alt: Mother spotted hyena standing with her cub in the wild
family.caption: Spotted hyenas live in large family groups called clans that are led by females.

range.fileTitle: File:Hiena manchada (Crocuta crocuta), reserva natural Masái Mara, Kenia, 2024-05-19, DD 52.jpg
range.alt: Spotted hyena on the open grassland of the Masai Mara, Kenya
range.caption: Spotted hyenas range widely across sub-Saharan Africa, from East Africa to the south.

size.alt: Full body side view of a spotted hyena standing in Etosha
size.caption: Adult spotted hyenas stand about knee-high to a person and can weigh up to 80 kilograms.

closeup.alt: Close-up of a spotted hyena's face, rounded ears, and eyes
closeup.caption: Powerful jaws and big teeth let hyenas crush bones that other predators leave behind.

fun-fact.fileTitle: File:Ngorongoro Conservation Area 02 - Spotted hyenas (Crocuta crocuta).jpg
fun-fact.alt: Group of spotted hyenas resting together in Ngorongoro, Tanzania
fun-fact.caption: Spotted hyenas 'laugh' with giggle-like calls that share excitement across the clan.

core-habitat.fileTitle: File:Hiena manchada (Crocuta crocuta), parque nacional de Tarangire, Tanzania, 2024-05-25, DD 26.jpg
core-habitat.alt: Spotted hyena in golden savanna grass at Tarangire, Tanzania
core-habitat.caption: Open grasslands give hyenas room to find prey and follow other hunting animals.

core-diet.fileTitle: File:Spotted Hyaena (Crocuta crocuta) eating some bird remains ... (51858022174).jpg
core-diet.alt: Spotted hyena feeding on small prey remains in the grass
core-diet.caption: Strong jaws and teeth let a hyena eat meat and crack bones other animals leave behind.

core-baby.alt: Young spotted hyena cub sitting on a dirt track
core-baby.caption: Cubs stay close to the den for months while the clan helps keep them safe.

core-family.fileTitle: File:Spotted Hyaenas (Crocuta crocuta) adult and cub ... (33224607536).jpg
core-family.alt: Adult spotted hyena beside a young cub in the wild
core-family.caption: Young hyenas learn their clan's ranks and rules by watching the adults around them.

core-range.fileTitle: File:Hiena manchada (Crocuta crocuta), parque nacional Serengueti, Tanzania, 2024-05-26, DD 24.jpg
core-range.alt: Spotted hyena crossing the Serengeti grassland in Tanzania
core-range.caption: Hyenas travel long distances across their home range to find food and water.
